title: The Ahmed family budget
instruction: Read the budget and answer the questions.
context: Monthly income: £1,600. Expenses: Rent £650 | Food shopping £250 | Gas and electric £90 | Water £30 | Phone £25 | Bus pass £55 | Clothes £50 | Total expenses: £1,150.

questions.question: What is the Ahmed family's monthly income?
What does 'bus pass' mean?
options: A ticket to travel on buses
A pass to drive a bus
questions.answer: A ticket to travel on buses

questions.question: How much money is left after all expenses?
What fraction of income is spent on rent?
If the family saves all remaining money for 6 months, how much do they save?
